name: Houthis (Yemen)
summary: Day 73-74 quiet — UKMTO Bab el-Mandeb / Gulf of Aden at MODERATE; no confirmed incidents affecting maritime traffic. **Houthi non-response to May 4 IRAN MULTI-AXIS KINETIC RESTART = increasingly anomalous.** Iran launched cruise missiles + drones + small boats at US Navy + UAE Fujairah + SK HMM Namu in Hormuz May 4; US Project Freedom convoy operation announced; sustained ceasefire-breaking. Houthis have NOT opened a parallel-front. Possible reads: (1) Iran-Houthi coordination constrained by UN Resolution 2812 + Saudi-Houthi deconfliction framework; (2) Houthis conserving missile stockpile for higher-value moment; (3) Houthi calculation that Red Sea attacks would draw Saudi back into kinetic game which Iran does not want. Through Trump's May 4 'blown off the face of the Earth' threats and explicit kinetic restart, Houthis remain operationally quiet. The 'Houthis enter the war' IntelliNews March 24 framing now durably falsified through THE highest-pressure escalation moment of crisis without Houthi response. Edge to shipping-tankers continues durable decay; coordination-decay thesis substantially strengthens.

active_triggers.condition: Houthis begin confirmed Red Sea attacks on NEUTRAL commercial shipping (verified by maritime trackers) — Day 47 attacks RESUMED but ONLY on belligerent-linked vessels (US/UK/Israeli). Neutral shipping
Houthis launch confirmed attack on Israel (missile/drone reaching Israeli territory)

DAY 65 RED SEA QUIET — IRAN'S HORMUZ-FIRST PROPOSAL VIA PAKISTAN + IRGC 'MORE SEVERE DAMAGES' RHETORIC + LEBANON KINETIC
DAY 64 RED SEA QUIET — UKMTO UPDATE 034 EXPLICITLY DOCUMENTS HOUTHI RHETORIC-WITHOUT-OPERATIONAL-INDICATORS

historical_summaries.summary: 10 signals. Abdul Malik al-Houthi declared group 'prepared to enter the war' with 'fingers on the trigger' in recorded address | Mohammed al-Bukhaiti (political bureau member, not military commander) told NYT: 'the expansion of the conflict to include other countries, | Three weeks into war, no Houthi attacks

22 signals. Day 33: STILL zero confirmed Houthi attacks on Red Sea commercial shipping | CONFIRMED ABSENCE: Day 34 of war — ZERO confirmed attacks on merchant shipping in Red Sea or Bab el-Mandeb | Day 35: ZERO confirmed Red Sea shipping attacks
